query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a paved street lined with trees and bushes, illuminated by a tall street lamp on the left. Dense foliage fills the right portion of the frame. In the background, additional distant lights and a dark hillside are visible beneath a dim sky. A watermark reading '© Ter.dpchallenge.com' appears in the bottom right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime street scene where a tall lamp casts a sickly yellow-green tint over the roadside vegetation, while the right side of the frame is consumed by extreme underexposure that crushes the dense foliage into near-black shadow. The stark contrast between the harsh artificial light and the impenetrable darkness creates a divided composition, with distant background lights and a dark hillside barely visible beyond the lamp's reach. A watermark reading '© Ter.dpchallenge.com' appears in the bottom right corner.
